description: During a heatwave, a VPP operator needs to use a fleet of smart thermostats to pre-cool homes before a demand response event.

nodes.task_description: Identify all enrolled smart thermostats in the target region.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves a list of 10,000 eligible thermostats.

nodes.task_description: Send a dispatch signal to the thermostats to pre-cool homes by 2 degrees in the hour leading up to the peak demand period.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully sends the pre-cooling command.

nodes.task_description: During the peak period, send a second signal to raise the setpoint by 4 degrees, creating a load reduction.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully sends the temperature setback command.

nodes.task_description: Monitor the aggregate load reduction from the thermostat fleet to verify performance.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the fleet is delivering the expected load shed.
